sources.notes: PLACEHOLDER — pillar values are not derived from a published mapping. Replace with proper extraction in iteration 4 or earlier review.

notes: PLACEHOLDER baseline for iteration 3 first run. Pillar scores are plausible-looking values for CZ context but are NOT extracted from V-Dem/EIU/FH/RSF/TI/WJP. The mapping (which V-Dem component → which pillar, with what weighting) is methodologically sensitive and requires explicit per-pillar derivation that is deferred to a future iteration. See methodology/issues.md for the open question. Do not publish public scores from this baseline; use it only for end-to-end pipeline validation.
